methodsAttempted.query: opencli google search 'site:unsw.edu.au generative AI policy'
DuckDuckGo: unsw.edu.au generative AI policy students
methodsAttempted.notes: DuckDuckGo browser search via OpenCLI. Found 10 results across unsw.edu.au and teaching.unsw.edu.au subdomains.

methodsAttempted.query: Direct URL probing of unsw.edu.au subdomains
methodsAttempted.notes: Probed www.unsw.edu.au, student.unsw.edu.au, teaching.unsw.edu.au, it.unsw.edu.au. Found 7 accessible AI-related URLs.

summary: Found 7 verified candidates for UNSW Sydney: formal AI Guidelines and Framework, AI assessment guidance, student AI toolkit, UNSW College student AI guidelines, teaching guidance, AI principles news article, and GenAI June 2023 update. 4 rejected URLs (redirect to unrelated page, no AI content, third-party platform, research showcase). Strong coverage of both student-facing and teaching/staff-facing AI policy sources. All verified sources returned HTTP 200. OpenCLI Google search was blocked; used DuckDuckGo browser search as fallback.
